kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: No one in the Joiners' Guild goes with 3 coins if and only if Carpenter goes with Riverside.
3 coins goes with exactly one of Beatrix, Carpenter, or Countess.
Wulfric's levy is at least 4 coins more than the Carpenter.
Southgate goes with exactly two of Rowan, Fletcher, Anvil, and Earl.
The artisan in Southgate's levy is exactly 4 coins more than Matilda.
Exactly two of the artisan with the Chisel, the artisan with the Loom, the artisan with 3 coins, and the artisan with 9 coins belong to the River Ward.
Exactly one of these is true: Matilda goes with 7 coins; Loom goes with Kingsford; Southgate goes with Bishop.
The artisan in Riverside's levy is between the artisan serving the Bishop and the Potter.
Matilda goes with at least three of Saw, Riverside, Earl, and 5 coins.
Fletcher, Highrow, and Riverside go with Bishop, Countess, and Earl, in some order.
Riverside goes with at least one of Chisel, Loom, or Bishop.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: No one in the Sunfish Family goes with 2 lb if and only if Bass goes with Stillwater.
2 lb goes with exactly one of Boone, Bass, or Dough.
Wade's weight is at least 4 lb more than the angler who landed the Bass.
Willowmere goes with exactly two of Mabel, Catfish, Popper, and Maggot.
The angler at Willowmere's weight is exactly 4 lb more than Esther.
Exactly two of the angler using the Spinnerbait, the angler using the Spoon, the catch with 2 lb, and the catch with 8 lb belong to the North Watershed.
Exactly one of these is true: Esther goes with 6 lb; Spoon goes with Foxglen; Willowmere goes with Corn.
The angler at Stillwater's weight is between the angler fishing with Corn and the angler who landed the Pike.
Esther goes with at least three of Swimbait, Stillwater, Maggot, and 4 lb.
Catfish, Birchpool, and Stillwater go with Corn, Dough, and Maggot, in some order.
Stillwater goes with at least one of Spinnerbait, Spoon, or Corn.
